chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Bail App. No. S – 66 of 2026 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Fresh case 1. For orders on MA No.379/2026 (U/A) 2. For orders on MA No.380/2026 (Ex./A) 3. For hearing of bail application 21.01.2026 Mr. Ayaz Ahmed Noonari, Advocate along with applicant / accused..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- 1. Urgency is allowed. 2. Exemption is granted subject to all just legal exceptions. 3. Applicant / accused Bashir Khan S/o Bahar Ali Maganhar seeks protective bail in Crime No.207 of 2025, registered at Police Station ‘A’ Section, Sukkur, under Sections 302, 114, 147, 148, 504, 337-A(i), 337-F(i), PPC. It is, inter alia, contended that applicant / accused is prepared to surrender before the trial Court, but apprehends his arrest at the hands of police. Without touching merits of the case, protective bail is granted to the applicant / accused for a period of five days, subject to his furnishing solvent surety in the sum of Rs.30,000/- (Rupees thirty thousand) and P.R. bond in the like amount to the satisfaction of the Additional Registrar of this Court. Operation of the NBW, if any, shall stand suspended for the period of five days. Applicant / accused shall surrender before the trial Court in the aforesaid period. This order shall cease to have any effect after expiry of five days or when the applicant surrenders before the trial court, whichever occurs earlier. The bail application stands disposed of in the above terms. J U D G E Abdul Basit
